description: This Dart source file defines a Flutter widget for displaying a user's favorite recipes in a grid layout, with support for responsive design, navigation, and empty state messaging.

classes.name: FavoritesScreen
classes.description: A stateless widget representing the favorites screen, displaying a grid of favorite recipes or an empty state message.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Constructs the widget tree for the favorites screen, including app bar, grid or empty message.

classes.name: _EmptyFavorites
classes.description: A private stateless widget displaying a message when there are no favorite recipes.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the widget tree for the FavoritesScreen, including determining grid columns based on screen width, and rendering either a grid of favorite recipes or an empty state widget.
